Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Oct-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KIMBERLY GATES JOHNSON, Esq. of Seven Hills LLP (Tel: 415-926-7247) for plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful;
Atty. HEIDY NURINDA, Esq. of Lewitt, Hackman, Shapiro, Marshall & Harlan (Tel: 818-907-3017) for defendant Rashman Corporation.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter discussed and submitted The parties having now met the conditions outlined in the Court's tentative ruling, the Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion is granted.

Consent judgment signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar as untimely per CCP 1005(b).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Steven Feldman, Esq. (818.907.3040; sfeldman@lewitthackman.com) of Lewitt, Hackman, Shapiro, Marshall & Harlan for Defendant.
